BBC Layoffs: Around 2,000 jobs at risk as broadcaster plans 10% cost cuts; Who may lose their jobs and why
articles.description: BBC Layoff 2026: The BBC is preparing to cut approximately 2,000 jobs, equivalent to around 10% of its workforce costs, as part of a wider plan to reduce spending by £500 million over the next two years. The broadcaster's news division is expected to be among the hardest hit, with reports suggesting that some radio programmes could also be affected by the cost-cutting measures.

articles.title: Punjab Elections Could Be Held In November This Year, Claims Kejriwal Amid Early Poll Buzz
articles.description: AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal has claimed that Punjab Assembly elections may be advanced to November 2026 instead of being held in February 2027 as scheduled. Kejriwal said he had received information suggesting that the poll schedule could be brought forward, sparking fresh political speculation in the state. The claim comes amid reports that major political parties, including AAP, Congress and BJP, have already begun preparations for a possible early election. While no official announcement has been made, the buzz around advancing the Punjab polls has intensified political activity across the state.

articles.title: Ways to trick yourself into eating better: Simple science-backed habits that actually work
articles.description: Stop relying on willpower alone. Discover science-backed environmental changes to reshape your eating habits and reach your health goals. Read our guide now.

articles.title: Kerala SSLC Result 2026 for Revaluation & Scrutiny declared @ sslcexam.kerala.gov.in, direct link here
articles.description: The Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan (KBPE) has declared the SSLC Revaluation and Scrutiny Result 2026 today, June 15. Candidates who were dissatisfied with their initial Class 10 marks and applied for a recheck can now check their revised scores on the official portal.

articles.title: ByteDance in talks with China's Iluvatar CoreX to purchase AI chips
articles.description: ByteDance, the influential technology entity known for its innovative platforms, is reportedly in discussions to acquire AI chip technology from Iluvatar CoreX and Baidu. This strategic move is largely focused on securing in-house chip supplies essential for running complex inference tasks. Should this partnership materialize, Iluvatar CoreX may join the ranks as ByteDance's third key GPU vendor.

Amidst this, attention turns to his supportive girlfriend, model and influencer Bruna Biancardi. She recently penned an emotional tribute to Neymar, highlighting his resilience and her unwavering support through his career's toughest moments.

articles.title: TMC rebellion: MPs meet Speaker, demand separate seating arrangement
articles.description: Rebel TMC MPs, including Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar and Sudip Bandyopadhyay, met Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla demanding separate seating. The MPs also met Union Minister Bhupender Yadav, with their camp claiming support of up to 22 MPs for the NDA.

articles.title: K'taka received 5x more Central funds vs UPA: Nirmala Sitharaman
articles.description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman refuted claims by the Karnataka government of neglect from the Centre, stating that the state received five times more tax devolution and significantly higher grants compared to the previous UPA tenure.

articles.title: 3-Year-Old Cancer Patient Dies At AIIMS Bhopal After Nurse Injects Him With Hazardous Chemical
articles.description: The incident that occurred in December 2025 and has now led to criminal charges against two nursing officers following an internal inquiry by the premier medical institute.

articles.title: Watch: Brazilian woman dies after Bungee Jump workers push her off bridge without safety cord; video showing final moments before freefall jump goes viral
articles.description: A 21-year-old woman died after being thrown from a bridge in Brazil during a rope jump activity. Safety equipment was not properly attached, leading to a fatal free fall. Three individuals were seen pushing her off the bridge before realizing the rope was unsecured. The incident is under investigation, with authorities noting the site's history of accidents.

articles.title: How Jeffrey Epstein used the fashion world to gain access to aspiring young models, according to newly released files
articles.description: Newly released US Justice Department records reveal how Jeffrey Epstein cultivated relationships with model scouts, agency insiders and recruiters who connected him with young women from around the world, years after concerns about his conduct first emerged.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by H.P. Lovecraft: 'The most merciful thing in the world is the inability of the human mind to...' - The Call of Cthulhu author reveals why not knowing everything keeps us sane
articles.description: Quote of the Day by H.P. Lovecraft is on the merciful inability of the human mind to know everything offers a strange comfort. This perspective suggests our limitations protect us from existential dread, allowing us to live on a placid island of ignorance rather than be consumed by the vastness of the unknown.
